ticket.subject: Give the WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.raw_subject: Give the WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.description:
Hello Jason,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our **WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin** from https://os.emmetts.com.au

 If you have faced any difficulties with the plugin, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your WooCommerce store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping plugin is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This plugin will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

Hello Jason,

We regret that you had to uninstall our WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin from https://os.emmetts.com.au

If you have faced any difficulties with the plugin, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your WooCommerce store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.

Did you know?

  • Our shipping plugin is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more.
  • This plugin will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s).
  • Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click.
  • Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support.


    • Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

    We would like to hear from you.

    Thanks and Regards,
    Team PluginHive

comments.plain_body:
Hello Jason, 
        

        

        We regret that you had to uninstall our WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin from https://os.emmetts.com.au
        

        

        If you have faced any difficulties with the plugin, we can hop on a call to assist you.
        Or if you are awaiting your WooCommerce store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.
        

        

         Did you know?
        

        

         
        Our shipping plugin is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more.
         
         
        This plugin will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s).
         
         
        Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click.
         
         
        Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support.
         
         
        

        

        Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.
        

        

        We would like to hear from you.
        

        

        Thanks and Regards,
        

        Team PluginHive
        

        https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Jason,

Thank you so much for your time over the call.

Your honest feedback means a lot to us! Please take a minute to leave us a review. This will keep our team motivated.
https://www.trustpilot.com/review/pluginhive.com

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please feel free to reach out to us anytime —we’re happy to help.

Wishing you a great day ahead!

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
In taking a copy of our production website https://www.emmetts.com.au/shop and using a test server, an exact copy at https://os.emmetts.com.au I disabled the plugin, the reason for you calling me.

Seems now we have lost functionality and shipping on our production server is defaulting to fallback rate -  why??



 ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/QcsWdCATaR40yRQMNgbWhJzJn/?name=image.png)

**Jason Keys**
Senior Web Developer & Systems Administrator
Emmetts, Group Support Centre
41a Roberts Avenue Horsham Victoria 3400
T: 03 5362 3015 | M: 0418 504 177
JKeys@emmetts.com.au | www.emmetts.com.au
 ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/FzsDIO1d8Yh33WYcF307XkJF1/?name=facebook_32x32_20a77f03-00c0-4385-ac4d-3fc9ed92f421.png)  ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/ircFHwuuZI82GLm1IpFkgNmB6/?name=linkedin_32x32_4780aec9-de05-44f1-9b3f-62b0c830bb20.png)  ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/8WiZB5ReEuo0ZQVYlLTiNpja7/?name=x_32x32_8a7e5e1b-27b3-4d5c-a4fe-9c53ccb84c12.png)  ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/Q79dAh563RRBmtRnHzbXHcTLe/?name=youtube_32x32_70a01c6c-dbdd-48a1-8994-89b19e8d3ed8.png)  ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/DD4pDw9Ynyg3uNjPmpAfXkLIe/?name=instagram_32x32_c611d5d5-dfce-4968-8dc2-97063afe26d3.png)  ![Emmetts AO email signature.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/ckrS6sg0NsqaiA46eWX4qzz95/?name=emmettsaoemailsignature_a74b7dea-44c6-43a2-92ff-09683c228c29.png)

comments.body:
Hello Jason,

Good Day!

Upon checking, it seems like the plugin has become inactive on your live store.

Please allow us some time so that we can make the plugin active again.

We will update you soon.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

We will update you soon.
 
Thanks and Regards,

comments.body:
Hello Jason,

Thank you for your time on the call.

As shared, the plugin is now active and accessible on your store. You can try accessing the plugin and let us know if you have any further queries.

Additionally, we have cross checked and can confirm that the shipping rates are available on checkout from the plugin as well.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Jason,
 
Thank you for your time on the call.
 
As shared, the plugin is now active and accessible on your store. You can try accessing the plugin and let us know if you have any further queries.
 
Additionally, we have cross checked and can confirm that the shipping rates are available on checkout from the plugin as well.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
